description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CMake (Windows) that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main, ignoring certain paths. The workflow should run on a Windows 2022 environment with a matrix strategy for different tool versions, build types, and architectures. For each matrix entry, check out the code, install Ninja, set up the MSVC development environment, configure and build with CMake, and perform cleanup and additional builds with Spectre mitigation and DLL configuration.
